name: Holiday Classics
description: 6 traditional Christmas carols, all public domain. Three-chord arrangements for easy group singing.

songs.title: Silent Night
songs.lyrics:
[C]Silent night, holy night,
[G7]All is calm, [C]all is bright,
[F]Round yon Virgin, [C]Mother and Child,
[F]Holy Infant so [C]tender and mild,
[G7]Sleep in heavenly [C]peace,
[C]Sleep in [G7]heavenly [C]peace.

[C]Silent night, holy night,
[G7]Shepherds quake [C]at the sight,
[F]Glories stream from [C]heaven afar,
[F]Heavenly hosts sing [C]Alleluia,
[G7]Christ the Savior is [C]born,
[C]Christ the [G7]Savior is [C]born.

songs.title: Jingle Bells
songs.lyrics:
[G]Dashing through the snow, in a one horse open sleigh,
[C]O'er the fields we [G]go, laughing all the [D7]way.
[G]Bells on bobtails ring, making spirits bright,
[C]Oh what fun it [G]is to ride and [D7]sing a sleighing song to[G]night, oh!

[G]Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way,
[C]Oh what fun it [G]is to ride in a [A7]one horse open [D7]sleigh, oh!
[G]Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way,
[C]Oh what fun it [G]is to ride in a [D7]one horse open [G]sleigh.

songs.title: Deck the Halls
songs.lyrics:
[G]Deck the halls with [D]boughs of [G]holly,
[D]Fa la la la [G]la, la la [D7]la [G]la.
[G]'Tis the season [D]to be [G]jolly,
[D]Fa la la la [G]la, la la [D7]la [G]la.
[D]Don we [G]now our [D]gay ap[G]parel,
[Em]Fa la la, [Am]la la la, [D7]la la [G]la.
[G]Troll the ancient [D]Yuletide [G]carol,
[D]Fa la la la [G]la, la la [D7]la [G]la.

[G]See the blazing [D]Yule before [G]us,
[D]Fa la la la [G]la, la la [D7]la [G]la.
[G]Strike the harp and [D]join the [G]chorus,
[D]Fa la la la [G]la, la la [D7]la [G]la.

songs.title: We Three Kings
songs.lyrics:
[Em]We three kings of [B7]Orient [Em]are,
[Am]Bearing gifts we [Em]traverse a[B7]far.
[G]Field and [D]fountain, [G]moor and [D]mountain,
[Am]Following [B7]yonder [Em]star.

[G]O star of [C]wonder, [G]star of [D]night,
[G]Star with royal [C]beauty [D]bright,
[G]Westward [Em]leading, [G]still pro[Em]ceeding,
[Am]Guide us to thy [B7]perfect [Em]light.

songs.title: Good King Wenceslas
songs.lyrics:
[G]Good King Wencel[D]as looked [G]out,
On the [C]feast of [D]Stephen,
[G]When the snow lay [D]round a[G]bout,
Deep and [C]crisp and [D]even.
[Em]Brightly shone the [D]moon that [Em]night,
Though the [Am]frost was [D]cruel,
[G]When a poor man [D]came in [Em]sight,
Gath'ring [C]winter [D]fu[G]el.

[G]"Hither, page, and [D]stand by [G]me,
If thou [C]know'st it, [D]telling,
[G]Yonder peasant, [D]who is [G]he?
Where and [C]what his [D]dwelling?"
[Em]"Sire, he lives a [D]good league [Em]hence,
Under[Am]neath the [D]mountain,
[G]Right against the [D]forest [Em]fence,
By Saint [C]Agnes' [D]foun[G]tain."

songs.title: The First Noel
songs.lyrics:
The [G]first No[Em]el the [D]angel did [G]say,
Was to [C]certain poor [G]shepherds in [D]fields as they [G]lay.
In [G]fields where [Em]they lay [D]keeping their [G]sheep,
On a [C]cold winter's [G]night that [D]was so [G]deep.

No[G]el, No[D]el, No[Em]el, No[D]el,
[G]Born is the [D]King of [Em]Is[D]ra[G]el.

They [G]looked [Em]up and [D]saw a [G]star,
Shining [C]in the [G]east, be[D]yond them [G]far.
And [G]to the [Em]earth it [D]gave great [G]light,
And [C]so it con[G]tinued [D]both day and [G]night.
